calculation_notes: Parsed the Model Performance Summary table from the original downloaded Galaxy HTML report archive and compared Train, Validation, and Test metrics rounded to three decimals.

basis: results/hid_5_Tabular_Learner_analysis_report_on_dataset_1_and_2.dat contains the Model Performance Summary table with all 24 reference metric values.
Galaxy history, uploads, tool submission, target column, threshold, and downloaded outputs are recorded in run artifacts.
results/tabular_learner_metrics_transformed.tsv was derived by table extraction from the downloaded Galaxy HTML report without changing values.
results/tabular_learner_metrics_transformed.tsv was derived only from downloaded Galaxy output text.
